header.note: Additional English source keys used in DiGA.Sax email templates that are not part of femanager's own locallang.

trans-unit.source: Please use Microsoft Edge, Mozilla Firefox or Google Chrome as your default browser. Using Internet Explorer as the default browser may cause issues. If this occurs, please use the password recovery function on the DiGA.Sax website.
Please do not reply to this email. This email was automatically generated by DiGA.Sax. If you have any questions, please contact bohrarchiv@lfulg.sachsen.de
